task.title: Implement core ping logic using subprocess in main.py
task.notes: Update the existing CLI entrypoint instead of creating a new package.

arguments.new_text:
import platform
import subprocess
import sys


def ping_host(host):
    param = '-n' if platform.system().lower() == 'windows' else '-c'
    command = ['ping', param, '4', host]
    result = subprocess.run(command, capture_output=True, text=True, check=False)
    return result.returncode == 0, result.stdout if result.stdout else result.stderr


def main():
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print("Usage: ping-cli <host>")
        sys.exit(1)

    host = sys.argv[1]
    success, output = ping_host(host)
    print(output)
    if not success:
        sys.exit(1)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
arguments.reason: Implement core ping logic using subprocess in main.py
